spec_match.rationale: The comparison separates section-level :target from grouped marker-level :target-current.

interactive.rationale: Controls click targets, scroll both columns, reset state, and update live readouts for URL target and visible section.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The side-by-side demo directly shows the difference between sticky fragment state and scroll-derived current marker state.

edge_cases.rationale: The click-then-scroll case is now the primary interaction and exposes when :target and :target-current disagree.

references.rationale: The page links to chromestatus.com/feature/5189126177161216 and the :target-current spec section.

design_system.rationale: The demo uses the shared CSS variable palette and keeps local button styles on the global defaults.

summary: The comparison now has live target/current readouts, scroll controls, reset behavior, and the missing ChromeStatus reference.
